goal: Add complete Kimi Code Skill and lifecycle Hook support.
description: Scope: Closure: capability - Kimi Code Better Plan integration. Context: Kimi Code supports standard Agent Skills and native lifecycle Hooks but Better Plan has no selectable or managed Kimi target. Target: install one discoverable Skill, manage only three detector-gated lifecycle Hook tables, translate native payloads and stdout, diagnose the target, and remove it cleanly. Design Considerations: extend the existing target inventory, shared Skill resolver, protocol adapter, TOML ownership boundary, and Doctor. Design Value: one native adapter reuses the canonical workflow without project-specific policy. Constraints & Risks: no tool interception, stop continuation, blocking response, absolute generated path, provider-config parsing, legacy Kimi path, or unrelated config rewrite.

symbols.name: context_response
symbols.signature: context_response(agent: str, event: str, value: str) -> dict[str, Any] | str

interfaces.name: Kimi target lifecycle
interfaces.inputs: normalized Kimi target and configured home root
interfaces.outputs: installed Skill plus owned lifecycle Hook tables
errors: InstallError when configuration cannot be updated safely

interfaces.name: Kimi lifecycle protocol
interfaces.inputs: native event payload and normalized lifecycle event
interfaces.outputs: plain guidance text, state reduction, or silent no-op
errors: safe no-op for invalid or unrelated contexts

dependencies.reason: manage only canonical Kimi lifecycle Hook tables
reuse the correlated completion reducer after SubagentStop

decisions.composition: one target adapter over the existing installer and Hook layers
decisions.algorithms: single-pass owned TOML table replacement and constant event mapping
decisions.data_structures: immutable target inventory and ordered Hook event mapping
decisions.state: Kimi config owns unrelated state; Better Plan owns only marked Hook tables
decisions.isolation: portable commands discover the installed Skill without embedding a machine path
decisions.concurrency: atomic config replacement prevents partial Hook installation

acceptance_criteria.text: Kimi Code installs, detects, advances, diagnoses, and uninstalls Better Plan through its current native Skill and Hook contracts while preserving unrelated configuration and remaining non-blocking.

commands: python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_tool tests.test_hook_tool tests.test_orchestration_workflow tests.test_agent_completion -v
